h0b88a69fg9122g4057g8785ge6ec79633cfe: I expect Lia and Cal to demand yet another showcase of prestidigitation, so I'd like a moment to myself.
h79b27c23gc531g4c12gb78fgd266fdadd518: An adoring crowd, fine wine - I dare say this place is almost civilised.
h0be3c115gb187g4471g8f5bg49c4307bf996: I saw the magic show. I wouldn't call Lia and Cal an 'adoring crowd'.
h06fa63a7g5880g431cgba40ge19aa44a8fa7: Only to the untrained eye. That was the fifth time they've asked for 'fireworks'. Heh. Glorified children, those two.
h258f0faag85f7g4ffeg932dgfc203be971af: Once my training with Lorroakan is complete, I'll put on a real show for them.
h8a328fcbg11bfg4622g8e1ag4fe1b0ba9984: I take it you're happy you stayed to help?
h01779f07g5616g4601gacecg7972019175a5: Not at all. But... perhaps Lia had a point. What is the point in blades and spells if we don't use them?
hf79f3283gebd6g4da7g8a40g08ab5d6d1f54: Though they won't need either, soon. As Lorroakan's apprentice, I'll take care of everything.
h62a36008ga4d4g46e4g8be7g52e8c7d21bb2: I'm surprised you're still here. I thought you'd be halfway to Baldur's Gate by now.
h9355bc4cg52e4g4425g9310g5b329900cf4c: As did I. But Lia and Cal were so excited for tonight, I thought it cruel to leave.
h4892b0a0gf13ag435fgb1b7g95eb6ec6c015: I didn't think a party beneath the stars was your idea of fun.
h7d1cf47dga05cg4886ga743g2daab693e82b: It isn't. But when one is forced among the common folk, it helps to lower expectations.
